title: Empowerment of Shri S. P. Jha as Joint secretary u/s 3 (1) of COFEPOSA Act.
description: Empowerment of Shri S. P. Jha as Joint secretary u/s 3 (1) of COFEPOSA Act.
text: REGD NO D. L -33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 742 ] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, AUGUST 19, 2002/SRAVANA 28,1924 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 19th August, 2002 S.O. 886(E),—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974), the Central Government hereby specially empowers Shri P C. Jha, Joint Secretary to the Government of India, for the purpose of the said section. [F. No.671/18/2001-CUS.VIII] S. C. GUPTA, Dy Secy. 2593 GI/2002 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of publications Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
